metadata.book_title: Brihat Parasara Hora Sastra Vol 2 By Maharishi Parashara
metadata.chapter_title: Results during the Mahadasa of Jupiter

content_blocks.text:
रन्ध्रे वा व्यये रहौ तद्दाये कष्टमादिशेत् ।
पापग्रहेण सम्बन्धे मारकग्रहसंयुते ॥
नीचराशिगते वापि स्थानभ्रंशो मनोव्यथा ।
विनाशी दारपुत्राणां कुत्तितान्नं च भोजनम् ॥
दशादौ देहपीड़ा च धनधान्यपरिस्थितिः ।
दशामध्ये तु सौख्यं स्यात् स्वदेशे धनलामकॄत् ॥
दशान्ते कष्टमाप्नोति स्थानभ्रंशो मनोव्यथा ॥४३॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
रन्ध्रे वा व्यये रहौ तद्दाये कष्टमादिशेत् ।
पापग्रहेण सम्बन्धे मारकग्रहसंयुते ॥
नीचराशिगते वापि स्थानभ्रंशो मनोव्यथा ।
विनाशी दारपुत्राणां कुत्तितान्नं च भोजनम् ॥
दशादौ देहपीड़ा च धनधान्यपरिस्थितिः ।
दशामध्ये तु सौख्यं स्यात् स्वदेशे धनलामकॄत् ॥
दशान्ते कष्टमाप्नोति स्थानभ्रंशो मनोव्यथा ॥४३॥
verse_data.topic: Rahu's results in the 8th or 12th house

content_blocks.text: If Rahu is posited in the 8th or the 12th house, the result of the Dasa is painful. If Rahu has connection with the malefic planets and is conjunct with 'Maraka' house, the result will be shifting of place, mental agony, death of wife and son, stale food etc. In the beginning of Dasa, physical stress and loss of wealth and agriculture produce, be expected and in the middle position of the Dasa, the native receives comforts and also wealth (profits) from the foreign countries. In the last portion of the Dasa, distress, change of place and mental stresses and strains will be felt.

verse_data.translation: If Rahu is posited in the 8th or the 12th house, the result of the Dasa is painful. If Rahu has connection with the malefic planets and is conjunct with 'Maraka' house, the result will be shifting of place, mental agony, death of wife and son, stale food etc. In the beginning of Dasa, physical stress and loss of wealth and agriculture produce, be expected and in the middle position of the Dasa, the native receives comforts and also wealth (profits) from the foreign countries. In the last portion of the Dasa, distress, change of place and mental stresses and strains will be felt.
verse_data.topic: Rahu's results in the 8th or 12th house

content_blocks.text:
Notes: During the Dasa of afflicted Rahu, the native encounters
- disappointments, irritation, injury, accidents, debts, negligence, theft,
plundering, cheating, heavy expenditure, disease and ailments, offensive
behaviours, suspicion, doubts, betrayal, etc.
Results during the Mahadasa of Jupiter :

यः सर्वैषु नभोगेपु बुधेरतिशुभः स्मृतः ।
तस्य देवेन्द्रपूज्यस्य कथयामि दशाफलम् ॥४४॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
यः सर्वैषु नभोगेपु बुधेरतिशुभः स्मृतः ।
तस्य देवेन्द्रपूज्यस्य कथयामि दशाफलम् ॥४४॥
verse_data.topic: Jupiter's auspiciousness and introduction to its results

content_blocks.text:
Amongst all the planets, the planet which is considered
as most auspicious, now I describe the results of the Dasa of that
divine-worship Jupiter.

verse_data.translation:
Amongst all the planets, the planet which is considered
as most auspicious, now I describe the results of the Dasa of that
divine-worship Jupiter.
verse_data.topic: Jupiter's auspiciousness and introduction to its results

content_blocks.text:
स्वेच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे जीवे केन्द्र लाभत्रिकोणगे ।
मूलत्रिकोणलाभे वा तुंगांशे स्वांशेऽपि वा ॥४५॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
स्वेच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे जीवे केन्द्र लाभत्रिकोणगे ।
मूलत्रिकोणलाभे वा तुंगांशे स्वांशेऽपि वा ॥४५॥
verse_data.topic: Jupiter in own sign, exalted, in Kendra/Trikona
Jupiter in own sign, exalted, in Kendra/Trikona
Jupiter in own sign, exalted, in Kendra/Trikona

content_blocks.text:
If Jupiter is in own sign, exalted, in Kendra or Trikona, or in
Mul-trikona, or in the Navamsa of exaltation or own sign, the native
will get kingdom, great happiness, fame and honour, elephants and
horses, worship of gods and Brahmins, happiness from wife and
children, vehicles, and success in religious ceremonies and hearing
about gods.

verse_data.translation:

children, vehicles, and success in religious ceremonies and hearing
about gods.

Dasas Results
रन्ध्रे वा व्यये रहौ तद्दाये कष्टमादिशेत् ।॥४०॥
पापग्रहेण सम्बन्धे मारकग्रहसंयुते ।
नीचराशिगते वापि स्थानभ्रंशो मनोव्यथा ।॥४१॥
विनाशी दारपुत्राणां कुत्तितान्नं च भोजनम् ।
दशादौ देहपीड़ा च धनधान्यपरिस्थितिः ।॥४२॥
दशामध्ये तु सौख्यं स्यात् स्वदेशे धनलामकॄत् ।
दशान्ते कष्टमाप्नोति स्थानभ्रंशो मनोव्यथा ॥४३॥
40-43: If Rahu is posited in the 8th or the 12th house, the
result of the Dasa is painful. If Rahu has connection with the malefic
planets and is conjunct with 'Maraka' house, the result will be
shifting of place, mental agony, death of wife and son, stale food
etc. In the beginning of Dasa, physical stress and loss of wealth and
agriculture produce, be expected and in the middle position of the
Dasa, the native receives comforts and also wealth (profits) from
the foreign countries. In the last portion of the Dasa, distress,
change of place and mental stresses and strains will be felt.
Notes: During the Dasa of afflicted Rahu, the native encounters
- disappointments, irritation, injury, accidents, debts, negligence, theft,
plundering, cheating, heavy expenditure, disease and ailments, offensive
behaviours, suspicion, doubts, betrayal, etc.
Results during the Mahadasa of Jupiter :
यः सर्वैषु नभोगेपु बुधेरतिशुभः स्मृतः ।
तस्य देवेन्द्रपूज्यस्य कथयामि दशाफलम् ॥४४॥
44: Amongst all the planets, the planet which is considered
as most auspicious, now I describe the results of the Dasa of that
divine-worship Jupiter.
स्वेच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे जीवे केन्द्र लाभत्रिकोणगे ।
मूलत्रिकोणलाभे वा तुंगांशे स्वांशेऽपि वा ॥४५॥
राज्यलाभं महासौख्यं राजसमानकीर्तनम् ।
गजवाजिसमायुक्तं देवब्रह्मणपूजनम् ॥४६॥
दारपुत्रादिसौख्यं च वाहनादरलाभजम् ।
यज्ञादिकर्मसिद्धिः स्याद्देवान्तश्रवणादिकम् ॥४७॥
